agents.title: Find a real estate agency in Marrakech

estimation.question: How much does a valuation cost?
estimation.answer: A valuation of your property is completely free and with no commitment. Our experts analyze your property based on the local market, property characteristics, and recent neighborhood trends.

duration.question: How long does it take to sell?
duration.answer: The average sale time in Marrakech is 3 to 6 months depending on the area and property type. High-end villas may take a little longer, while well-located apartments sell faster.

documents.question: What documents are required?
documents.answer: Land title, plot plan, deed of ownership, and tax certificates. Our team will help you put together the file.

remote.question: Can I sell from abroad?
remote.answer: Yes, a power of attorney signed in your country is enough to represent your sale. We handle the entire transaction remotely.

fees.question: What are the agency fees?
fees.answer: Agency fees are generally 5% incl. VAT on the sale, paid by the buyer. This rate may vary depending on the mandate and property type.

signing.question: How does the signing process work?
signing.answer: The signing takes place at the notary or Adoul, with a translator if needed. We organize all appointments and guide you through every step.
